name: Smoots Tennis First Serve
author: Poki
description: Smoots Tennis First Serve is a 3D tennis game created by Kaneda Games. Choose from a wide variety of characters, challenge your friends, and enjoy all the emotion of a tennis match in this game with stylized 3d graphics! Make sure to hit and return all the balls that your opponent throws at you, score points, and crown yourself as the winner of the match! How to play: Move - Arroy Keys Shoot/Drive - Spacebar Shoot/Slice - N Shoot/Lob - M About the creator: Smoots Tennis First Serve was created by Kaneda Games. They are also the creators of Smoots Pinball Zombie on Poki !
